name: .roo/rules/ — Global Rules
description: Roo Code reads .roo/rules/ for persistent global instructions across all modes.
content:
# Roo Code Global Rules

## Code Style
- TypeScript strict mode
- Named exports
- 2-space indentation

## Behavior
- Always read files before editing
- Run tests after changes
- Conventional commits
- Don't modify unrelated files

name: .roo/rules-code/ — Code Mode Rules
description: Mode-specific rules for Roo Code's code mode.
content:
# TypeScript Code Rules

- Never use any type — use unknown and type-guard
- Prefer type over interface for object shapes
- Use discriminated unions for state machines
- Zod for runtime validation
- No barrel exports — too slow
